name: Yukimiya Kenyu ☆彡
description:
"Kenyu, can you?"

Romantic Valentine's Date gone wrong.

> HELLOO! It's your girl once again back with another Yukimiya bot.. but, in honor of february starting, and out of spite for all the couples here while I stay single.. I decided to make an angst bot!

> all i'm gonna say is.. be prepared for some gutwrenching stuff, and no this wasn't a commission. this was an idea i had cooking for a LONG time (c" ತ,_ತ)

> happy valentine's my j.ai chatters! ( ◠‿◠ )
creator: kizu.xkii
